description: A production incident review revealed that several microservices in the 'services' namespace have misconfigured or missing Kubernetes health probes, causing pod instability and routing traffic to unready pods. Audit the four deployments in the 'services' namespace and update their health probes to match the specification in /home/ga/Desktop/health_check_spec.yaml. Ensure all pods reach a stable Running state. Login to Rancher at https://localhost (cluster: 'local') using credentials admin / Admin12345678!.

metadata.occupation: Computer Systems Engineer / Site Reliability Engineer
